productDisplayName: Nike Men Blue Manchester United Jersey
description: CompositionIndigo blue and black striped manchester united jersey made of 100% recycled polyester Dri-Fit fabric in a mesh finish, that has round black ribbed neckline with a panel on the front, short striped sleeves with panel detailing, Manchester United seal appliqued on the upper left chest, swoosh logo embroidered on the upper right chest and AON print below the swoosh and the sealFittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryReturn to greatness with this bold indigo blue and black striped Manchester United football Club Soccer jersey from nike. This jersey pays homage to the incredibly successful team with strong design details like the club badge, coupled with it's official insurance sponsor, AON. The Dri-FIT performance fabric ensures breathability and comfort on and off the field.
